name: David's Favorite Dill Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak whole cucumbers overnight in cold water and 1/2 teaspoon alum.
2. Wash and slice the cucumbers as desired.
3. Pack the sliced cucumbers into hot jars, adding 1 1/2 teaspoons of dill seed and 1-3 whole garlic cloves to each jar.
4. Mix vinegar, water, and salt in a large pot. Bring to a boil and pour over the cucumbers in the hot jars.
5. Seal the jars tightly.
Brine will cover about 8 quarts of pickles.
